assessment.focus_note: The geopolitical situation remains highly volatile, particularly concerning Iran and its interactions with the US and global shipping. Domestic political maneuvering around future elections and policy changes (like redistricting and White House communication strategies) also warrant close attention. Continue monitoring China's increasing influence and its counterpoint to Western policies.
